20.gl: seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number
20.dv: or (masculine) (שִׁבְעָה); from H7650 (שָׁבַע); a primitive cardinal number;

20.gl: to cover (specifically with bitumen); figuratively, to expiate or condone, to placate or cancel
20.kj: appease, make (an atonement, cleanse, disannul, forgive, be merciful, pacify, pardon, purge (away), put off, (make) reconcile(-liation).

21.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
21.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
21.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

21.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
21.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

21.gl: properly, sweetness; concretely, sweet (i.e. not soured or bittered with yeast); specifically, an unfermented cake or loaf, or (elliptically) the festival of Passover (because no leaven was then used)
21.dv: from H4711 (מָצַץ) in the sense of greedily devouring for sweetness;

21.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.
(eigh-, fif-, four-, nine-, seven-, six-, thir-) teen(-th), [phrase] eleven(-th), [phrase] sixscore thousand, [phrase] twelve(-th).

21.gl: first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
21.kj: ancestor, (that were) before(-time), beginning, eldest, first, fore(-father) (-most), former (thing), of old time, past.

22.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

22.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
22.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

22.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
22.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
22.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

22.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
22.kj: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

23.gl: seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number
23.dv: or (masculine) (שִׁבְעָה); from H7650 (שָׁבַע); a primitive cardinal number;

23.gl: properly, strength; hence, anything strong; specifically a chief (politically); also a ram (from his strength); a pilaster (as a strong support); an oak or other strong tree
23.kj: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.

23.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
23.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

23.gl: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke)

23.dv: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה);

24.kj: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.

24.gl: a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary)
24.dv: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow;

24.gl: grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness
24.kj: anointing, [idiom] fat (things), [idiom] fruitful, oil(-ed), ointment, olive, [phrase] pine.

24.gl: a bullock (apparently as breaking forth in wild strength, or perhaps as dividing the hoof)
an ephah or measure for grain; hence, a measure in general
